hub.title: Campaign
hub.subtitle: Stories, ideas, and visions that define what Daikin stands for.

idealAir.title: The Ideal Air
idealAir.subtitle: What does the perfect air feel like? Daikin's answer is found in science, comfort, and harmony.
idealAir.intro: The ideal air isn't just about temperature. It's about humidity, purity, movement, and how the air makes you feel - at home, at work, and everywhere in between.

temperature.title: Perfect Temperature
temperature.body: Consistent, precise cooling that adapts to your body and activity level.

humidity.title: Ideal Humidity
humidity.body: 40–60% relative humidity for comfort, health, and protecting your home and belongings.

purity.title: Clean Air
purity.body: Free from viruses, bacteria, allergens, and pollutants - air you can truly breathe.

flow.title: Natural Airflow
flow.body: Gentle, even distribution that mimics natural breezes without direct drafts.

powerToCreate.title: The Power to Create the Air of the Future
powerToCreate.subtitle: Daikin's vision for sustainable, intelligent air solutions in the decades ahead.
powerToCreate.vision: We believe the next generation of air conditioning will not just cool - it will heal, energize, and sustain. Daikin is building that future today.

r32.title: R-32 Refrigerant
r32.body: Industry-wide transition to lower-GWP refrigerants, reducing climate impact by two-thirds.

ai.title: AI-Powered Comfort
ai.body: Machine learning algorithms that learn your preferences and optimize comfort automatically.

renewable.title: Renewable Integration
renewable.body: Systems designed to work seamlessly with solar panels and other renewable energy sources.

circular.title: Circular Economy
circular.body: Designing products for repairability, recyclability, and minimal end-of-life waste.

perfectingAir.title: Perfecting The Air Stories
perfectingAir.subtitle: Real stories from Daikin customers and communities whose lives have been transformed by cleaner, better air.

stories.intro: Every Daikin installation tells a story. A hospital that reduced infection rates. A school where students learn in comfort. A home where a child with asthma sleeps through the night.

submit.title: Share Your Story
submit.description: Has Daikin made a difference in your life or business? We'd love to hear from you.
